item.title: The 2026-2027 Season of Events - 05/01/2026 12:00am EDT to 09/08/2026 11:59pm EDT
item.description: Location : 30 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Here it is, folks! There are still a couple of [...]
item.dc:creator: The Ritz Theatre
item.yodel:media_alt_text: The 2026-2027 Season of Events on May 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include season of events and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: Seneca Conservation District - 07/02/2026 10:30am EDT to 07/02/2026 11:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Seneca Conservation District will be visiting us! Elementary Programs are designed for children going into Kindergarten through 5th Grade.
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Seneca Conservation District on Jul 2, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include kindergarten through 5th grade and seneca east public library.

item.title: Happy Birthday America Storytime - 07/02/2026 11:00am EDT to 07/02/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for the "Happy Birthday America! Storytime" on Thursday, July 2 at 11:00 a.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library. Celebrate the spirit of Independence Day through engaging stories, songs, and simple crafts, designed for young children and their caregivers. This family-friendly event is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program “Unearth a Story” and the America 250 celebration. For more details, visit the Junior Library, call 419-447-3751, or check our website at http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Happy Birthday America Storytime on Jul 2, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seasonal and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/02/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/02/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 107 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Steinmetz Signs & Graphic Ink (SSG Ink - Shortened)
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 2, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include interactive experience and seasonal.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/02/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/02/2026 4:00pm EDT

item.dc:creator: Simply Susan's
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 2, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Seasonal & Holiday and Kids & Family.

item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 2, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include family friendly and interactive experience.

item.title: Backpackin’ Babies—Water! - 07/02/2026 2:00pm EDT to 07/02/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 701 E County Rd 6 #6, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA For ages birth to 18 months.  Babies need the great outdoors as much as older youth and adults do.  They need the exposure to fresh air, new environments and learn more than we think.  Spend the afternoon with Linda Rose exploring the waters of Honey Creek.  Bring an extra set of clothes to change into.   Come in a front pack, backpack, stroller or just walk.  Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Backpackin’ Babies—Water! on Jul 2, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Outdoors and fresh air.

item.title: Family Movie Night - 07/02/2026 5:30pm EDT to 07/02/2026 7:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Join us for Family Movie Night! Bring your dinner, favorite blanket or camp chair & get comfy! Folding chair seating and popcorn provided! Call the library at 419-426-3825 to find out what is playing.
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Family Movie Night on Jul 2, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include dinner and family movie night.

item.title: America 250 Local Author Visit: J. Edward Richey - 07/02/2026 6:00pm EDT to 07/02/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join Tiffin-Seneca Public Library on Thursday, July 2 at 6:00 p.m. for the America 250 Local Author Visit featuring J. Edward Richey, a lifetime resident, author, and publisher. As part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program “Unearth a Story” and the America 250 celebration, Richey will discuss how national and global events have influenced Tiffin and Seneca County, while highlighting his six-book historical series, including A Photo History of Tiffin and Seneca County Ohio – Volumes 1 and 2, and A Photo History of Northwest Ohio – Volumes 1-4. Attendees will have the opportunity to purchase signed copies, with payment options including credit cards, PayPal, Venmo, pre-paid Visa or MasterCard, GooglePay, and ApplePay (no cash or checks). For more information, contact the library at (419) 447-3751 or visit http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: America 250 Local Author Visit: J. Edward Richey on Jul 2, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include america 250 local author visit: j. edward richey and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: Financial Fitness Friday - 07/03/2026 8:30am EDT to 07/03/2026 5:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 25 Shaffer Park Dr, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join our Financial Counselor Rusti Claydon for Financial Fitness Friday, a new monthly event for our membership for FREE walk-in assistance and education surrounding your financial concerns! The first Friday of each month, Rusti has cleared her schedule to allow for members of the credit union to stop in and ask questions about their situation, ask for insights into how we can assist and how to better utilize Your Legacy Federal Credit Union offerings to their benefit! Not a member? Rusti can get you started with just a $5 minimum initial share. See you there!
item.dc:creator: Your Legacy Federal Credit Union
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Financial Fitness Friday on Jul 3, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include free walk-in assistance and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/03/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/03/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Shop Tiffin Ohio
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 3, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include interactive experience and seasonal.

item.dc:creator: New Riegel Cafe
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Corner T Fun on Jul 3, 2026 in New Riegel, OH. This is a recurring event with themes including new and riegel.

item.title: Old Skool at Village of Green Springs Independence Day Celebration - 07/03/2026 6:00pm EDT to 07/03/2026 10:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 120 Catherine St, Green Springs, OH 44836, USA Come join OLD SKOOL at the VILLAGE OF GREEN SPRINGS INDEPENDENCE DAY FESTIVAL FRIDAY JULY 3, 2026 PARADE LINE UP @GS ELEMENTARY AT 2:30 PARADE STEPS OFF AT 3:00 •COUNTY LINE TUG-O-WAR •FOOD TRUCKS AND VENDORS UNTIL MIDNIGHT •50/50, BINGO, AND PULL TABS •BEER TENT & MUSIC UNTIL MIDNIGHT •PATRIOTIC DUCK HUNT PROMEDICA AIR, SENECA COUNTY EMS, POLICE K9 MEET & GREET, SANDUSKY COUNTY DRONE TEAM AT 4:00 (*SUBJECT TO AVAILABILITY*) **$10 WRISTBAND FOR ALL DAY PLAY** 4:00-8:00 •25' ROCKWALL (60-250 LBS) •20' BALL PIT (AGES 3-7) •120' OBSTACLE COURSE (ALL AGES) •5 SUPER BOUNCE TRAMPOLINES (30-255LBS) •22' TALL INFLATABLE SLIDE (MINIMUM 36" TALL) •20' BOUNCE HOUSE (AGES 4+) •FIRE TRUCK TRAIN RIDE (ALL AGES) •FACEPAINT •CORN HOLE TOURNAMENT IN BEER TENT BAGS (PRE REGISTER) 4:30 BAGS FLY AT 5 •KIDDY TRACTOR PULL (PRE REGISTER) 4:30 KIDDY TRACTOR PULL AT 5:00 LIVE BAND: OLD SKOOL 6PM UNTIL 10:00PM FIREWORKS AT DUSK EVENTS RUN 3:00 - MIDNIGHT SPONSORED BY: •GREEN SPRINGS FIRE DEPARTMENT 4TH OF JULY COMMITTEE •KENNETH MYERS CONSTRUCTION CO. INC LOCATION: 120 CATHRINE ST GREEN SPRINGS http://OldSkoolCle.com/
item.dc:creator: Village of Green Springs Independence Day Celebration Committee
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Old Skool at Village of Green Springs Independence Day Celebration on Jul 3, 2026 in Green Springs, OH. Featured themes include old skool at village of green springs independence day celebration and rockwall.

item.title: July 4th (250 Years) Celebration - 07/04/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/04/2026 10:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 621 E Market St #1734, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The car show will be the first event at 9am, following will be concerts, inflatables, yummy food, and then boom boom double the fireworks at 10pm
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Parks & Recreation
item.yodel:media_alt_text: July 4th (250 Years) Celebration on Jul 4, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.description: Location : 621 E Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The car show will be the first event at 9am, following will be concerts, inflatables, yummy food, and then boom boom double the fireworks at 10pm

item.title: Simply Susan’s Strawberry Saturdays! - 07/04/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/04/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 70 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Chocolate covered strawberry cups are returning! $5 each until sold old! Come see us every Saturday during the farmers market! 70 s Washington. St Tiffin Ohio 44883
item.dc:creator: Simply Susan's
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Simply Susan’s Strawberry Saturdays! on Jul 4, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and Markets.

item.title: BREAKFAST & PIEROGI @ JAM’s Markets Saturdays 9a-1p - 07/04/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/04/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 144 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us at JAM’s Markets every Saturday from 9 AM to 2 PM for a delightful breakfast experience! Stop by 145 Madison St, Tiffin, Ohio, and enjoy a variety of freshly made breakfast and lunch items, including delicious pierogi and artisanal sourdough breads. Our offerings are available while supplies last, so come early to savor these buzzworthy bites!
item.dc:creator: JAM's Monthly Markets
item.yodel:media_alt_text: BREAKFAST & PIEROGI @ JAM’s Markets Saturdays 9a-1p on Jul 4, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and Food & Drink.

item.title: Farmers Market - 07/04/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/04/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 195 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Discover the joy of fresh produce, delightful baked goods, and stunning flowers, all waiting for you every Saturday morning!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Seneca Farmers Market
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Farmers Market on Jul 4, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include baked goods and farmers market.

item.title: Farmers Market - 07/04/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/04/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 195 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Discover the joy of fresh produce, delightful baked goods, and stunning flowers, all waiting for you every Saturday morning!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Seneca Farmers Market
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Farmers Market on Jul 4, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin, ohio and Markets.

item.title: 4th of July Gemstone Mining Offer - 07/04/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/04/2026 5:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 15248 E Township Rd 178, Bellevue, OH 44811, USA Celebrate Independence Day with a sparkling deal the whole family will love! Buy ANY 3 bags of mining rough (for use in our outdoor sluice) and get the 4th FREE— a Patriot’s Prospect Bag— offer available 7/4/26 only! But that’s not all! While you're here: Take a one-hour guided tour of Seneca Caverns— explore an Ohio Natural Landmark Browse our gift shop— filled with treasures, crystals, and merch Relax in our shaded picnic area— perfect for a midday break or lunch with the family Open daily 9AM–6PM, rain or shine. Happy 4th of July from all of us at Seneca Caverns!
item.dc:creator: Seneca Caverns
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 4th of July Gemstone Mining Offer on Jul 4, 2026 in Bellevue, OH. Featured themes include picnic area and 4th of july gemstone mining offer.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/04/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/04/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Shop Tiffin Ohio
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 4, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seasonal and summer activities.

item.title: Daybreak Service - 07/05/2026 8:30am EDT to 07/05/2026 9:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 131 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for Daybreak Service at Trinity United Church of Christ — a peaceful 30-minute morning gathering to start your day with reflection and community. When: March 1, 2026, 8:30 AM. Where: 131 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH. All are welcome. #DaybreakService #TrinityUCC #TiffinOH #MorningWorship #Community
item.dc:creator: Trinity United Church of Christ Tiffin
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Daybreak Service on Jul 5, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include community and daybreak service.

item.title: Sunday School & Sunday Service - 07/05/2026 9:30am EDT to 07/05/2026 10:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA 9:30am-10:30am Sunday School Classes for Toddlers, Kids, Youth, and Adults on Sunday mornings that study the Bible and talk about applying it to our lives. 10:30am Worship followed by Sunday Service. 10:50am Online, worship at home and join us on Facebook or YouTube at 10:50am live, or watch later at your convenience.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Sunday School & Sunday Service on Jul 5, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include fostoria, ohio and kids.

item.title: Service of the Word - 07/05/2026 10:00am EDT to 07/05/2026 11:00am EDT
item.description: Location : Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for worship, Sunday mornings at 10:00 am. In person or online via Facebook and Youtube. (search: Trinity UCC Tiffin)
item.dc:creator: Trinity United Church of Christ Tiffin
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Service of the Word on Jul 5, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include online service and service of the word.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/05/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/05/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: Shop Tiffin Ohio
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 5, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include wild goose chase and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: Make it at Home: Daisy Painting - 07/06/2026 9:30am EDT to 07/06/2026 10:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Tiffin-Seneca Public Library’s virtual craft series for adults, “Make It At Home,” will offer free supply kits and an instructional video on how to make a daisy painting beginning Monday, July 6. Patrons can pick up a supply kit at the Information Desk full of almost everything needed to make a craft each month, and will only need to use a few basic supplies from home. An instructional video on how to make the painting will be posted on the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library YouTube channel and Facebook page. Please note that kits will be available on a first-come, first-served basis, and registration is not required. One kit per adult. Must be present to receive your kit. This program is free for adults. If all kits are gone, the instruction video and information sheet can still be found at http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/julymakeitathome.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Make it at Home: Daisy Painting on Jul 6, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include supply kits and tiffin seneca public library.

item.title: Toddler Trot—MUD! - 07/06/2026 2:00pm EDT to 07/06/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : Garlo Heritage Nature Preserve, S., 6777 OH-19, Bloomville, OH 44818, USA For ages 18 to 36 months.  Join Linda Rose as we explore mud mountain and prepare to get a bit muddy.  An extra set of clean clothes may be required! Registration is required at least 24 hours in advance of the program.
item.dc:creator: Seneca Parks
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Toddler Trot—MUD! on Jul 6, 2026 in Bloomville, OH. Featured themes include ages 18 to 36 months and mud mountain.

item.title: Celebrate Recovery Bible Study - 07/06/2026 6:00pm EDT to 07/06/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Join us for Celebrate Recovery Bible Study Monday nights at 6pm. A group for everyone, as we deal with the hurts, hang ups, and habits in life. Bring your family, friends, and neighbors. A time of Bible Study, sharing life, and fellowship. No childcare is provided.
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Celebrate Recovery Bible Study on Jul 6, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include celebrate recovery and celebrate recovery bible study.

item.title: America250 Trivia for Adults and Teens - 07/06/2026 6:30pm EDT to 07/06/2026 7:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 14 N Main St, Attica, OH 44807, USA Registration required and will open up two weeks prior to the event. Sign up at the library or by calling 419-426-3825.
item.dc:creator: Seneca East Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: America250 Trivia for Adults and Teens on Jul 6, 2026 in Attica, OH. Featured themes include teens and america250 trivia for adults and teens.

item.title: Summer Basic Electricity - 07/07/2026 8:00am UTC to 07/07/2026 4:30pm UTC
item.description: Location : 342 Perry St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Length 24 hours $2000 per student Basic Electricity I is an introductory electricity course for skilled trade’s personnel. The course is a study of DC and AC electricity principles, with a practical approach to applications in an industrial environment. The learner will obtain a knowledgeable understanding of the key symbols and abbreviations associated with the electrical trade, acquire a comprehensive understanding of basic electrical terminology, apply Ohm’s Law to a number of relevant electrical applications, and synthesize a number of components into a working system involving series, parallel, and series parallel
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Learning Center
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Summer Basic Electricity on Jul 7, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include skilled trade personnel and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: Summer Hydraulics - 07/07/2026 8:00am UTC to 07/07/2026 4:30pm UTC
item.description: Location : 342 Perry St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Length: 24 Hours $2000 per person Course Description: This course is a basic study of the principles of fluid power systems based on industrial applications with hydraulics. A heavy focus is on hydraulic systems, components, assembling circuits and demonstrating the circuits operate correctly. The student will learn how to interpret a hydraulic circuit print and predict the operation of a circuit based on the print. The student will also assemble and troubleshoot the circuits in a controlled lab environment with industrial grade devices. Students will also utilize the simulation software, Automation Studio, to simulate hydraulic circuits in an asynchronous format. The student will also be focusing on safety when working w
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Learning Center
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Summer Hydraulics on Jul 7, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include fostoria learning center and hydraulic systems.

item.title: Laundry Day - 07/07/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/07/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 339 Sandusky St, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA Sign up for our free laundry days this month at FNC Hope Community Center. Laundry Days, Tuesday June 7th & 21st 9am-3pm Each family can wash 1 load per month free, laundry detergent is also provided. You must sign up online for an appointment by clicking the link below, or contact Fostoria Church of the Nazarene or the United Way of Fostoria by phone to help you sign up. The location is 339 Sandusky Street in the FNC Community Center https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0548AEAB2FAAFBC25-60083268-laundry
item.dc:creator: Fostoria Church of the Nazarene
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Laundry Day on Jul 7, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include families and fnc community center.

item.title: Heidelberg Youth Football Camp - 07/07/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/09/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description:
Location : 138 Greenfield St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA

The Heidelberg Football Youth Camp is designed to serve campers ages 6 to 13 in all areas of football development. The purpose of our youth camp is to teach the fundamentals of football to the youth of Tiffin and the surrounding area. The non-contact instruction by our expert staff is designed to help improve the skill level and football IQ of our campers. The camp will instruct each day on offense, defense, special teams, age appropriate strength and conditioning instruction, and flexibility and speed improvement. We will instruct on academic success and the importance it will have for the camper as he approaches high school and beyond. The coaching staff and players from Heidelberg will work directly with campers to ensure a safe, exciting, and fun-filled experience for all attendees.

Whether you are an experienced player, or a first time participant, our camp will improve your skill and give you a better understanding of the fundamentals, concepts, execution, and team work necessary to form a championship player and team. Each camper will receive a detailed evaluation, a camp t-shirt, and a camp certificate of completion. We look forward to working with your child in a family-friendly, positive, fun-filled environment.

Our camp will run from Tuesday, July 7 to Thursday, July 9. The camp will begin at 9:00 AM and conclude at noon daily. Please arrive early on the first day to help with registration. Our staff will be on hand on Tuesday, beginning at 8:00 AM for registration, and will be available for the monitoring of campers at 8:30 for the remainder of camp. Registration, drop-off, and pick up each day will be at Riesen Field, at Hoernemann Stadium located on Heidelberg’s campus.
item.dc:creator: Heidelberg University Football
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Heidelberg Youth Football Camp on Jul 7, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include football and heidelberg.
